minor_concerns: Pre-existing batch-send/single-send buttons in plan-detail.njk still use the JSON-into-#main-content pattern (not in this PR's scope, follow-up sprint)
DB-level unique constraint on Interview(planId, userId) would harden M4 (TOCTOU) beyond the transaction-only mitigation
renderMarkdown uses `token.type = 'text' as 'html'` cast - functional but type-laundering
resendToInterview (pre-existing) lacks the transaction symmetry that removeMember now has
$transaction unit test mock doesn't exercise true atomicity semantics
summary: Round 1 REQUEST_CHANGES (3 Critical: HTMX nested-page, missing adminAuth, XSS unsanitized; 7 Major: no transaction, TOCTOU, stale counters, serial reminders, missing zod, substring error matching, null contract violation). Round 2 APPROVED 2/2 with confidence 9/10 after all 10 issues addressed via 37 new passing tests, $transaction wrapping, typed error classes, Promise.allSettled batching, marked walkTokens XSS escape, adminAuth preHandlers, and hx-on::after-request fragment refresh pattern. Zero new regressions.
